nasb.text: He said, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, who spoke with His mouth to my father David and has fulfilled it with His hands, saying,

esv.text: And he said, “Blessed be the Lord, the God of Israel, who with his hand has fulfilled what he promised with his mouth to David my father, saying,

cnv.text: 所羅門說：“耶和華以色列的　神是應當稱頌的！他親口對我的父親大衛應許的，已親手作成了，他說：

ccb.text: 他说：“以色列的上帝耶和华当受称颂！祂亲口给我父大卫的应许，祂也亲手成就了！
